content: OpenGameArt has curated CC0 calm/relaxing music collections and seamless ambient loops (e.g. 'CC0 - Calm / Relaxing Music' collection, 'Ambient Relaxing Loop', 'Short Loops Background Music Pack' — 4 seamless OGG tracks). Typical delivery OGG (sometimes FLAC/MP3), loops usually 30s-2min, file sizes roughly 1-5 MB per OGG loop. CC0 = no attribution needed.
